Study Halls

Study Halls

Doğuş University Student Study Halls

are designed to offer students the opportunity to work in a comfortable environment. Students who prefer to study outside the library can benefit from these rooms whenever they want. The lounges are located relatively far from the classrooms and the points where the human traffic is intense, allowing students to study without worrying about attention and focus.

The halls opened at 09.00 in the morning can also be used in evening hours.
